title: Smart Mechanic AI Workflow System
author: Joshua Solomon
summary:
This is a submission for the Notion MCP Challenge

What I Built

< I built a Smart Mechanic AI Workflow System using Notion to help mechanics manage their daily workshop operations more efficiently.
This system is designed for real-world use, especially for local mechanics who struggle with tracking jobs, pricing services correctly, and managing customers.
The workflow includes:
A Customer Job Tracker to log car issues, services, and payment status
A Daily Earnings Dashboard to monitor income and growth
A Smart Pricing Assistant to guide mechanics on how much to charge
An AI-powered Diagnosis Helper that suggests possible faults based on symptoms
This solution helps mechanics move from manual, unorganized work to a structured and professional system.>

full_text:
Notion MCP Challenge Submission 🧠

 
 

 

This is a submission for the Notion MCP Challenge

 
 
 What I Built

< I built a Smart Mechanic AI Workflow System using Notion to help mechanics manage their daily workshop operations more efficiently.

This system is designed for real-world use, especially for local mechanics who struggle with tracking jobs, pricing services correctly, and managing customers.

The workflow includes:

A Customer Job Tracker to log car issues, services, and payment status

A Daily Earnings Dashboard to monitor income and growth

A Smart Pricing Assistant to guide mechanics on how much to charge

An AI-powered Diagnosis Helper that suggests possible faults based on symptoms

This solution helps mechanics move from manual, unorganized work to a structured and professional system.>

 
 
 Video Demo

< In my demo video, I walk through:

How I log a new customer and their car issue

How the system tracks job progress and payment

How I use AI prompts inside Notion to assist diagnosis and pricing

How I track my daily income and performance

The video shows how this system can improve efficiency and increase earnings for mechanics.>

Watch my real-life car diagnostic process here:

https://youtube.com/shorts/xOXmXyvG6Ig?feature=share

This video proves that my solution is already being used in real-life scenarios, making it practical, scalable, and impactful.

 
 
 Show us the code

< This project is built using Notion, so there is no traditional code repository.

However, the structure includes:

Notion databases (tables) for jobs, customers, and earnings

Pre-written AI prompts for diagnosis and pricing

A clean, easy-to-use interface for daily workflow.>

 
 
 How I Used Notion MCP

< I used Notion as a central system to organize and manage all workshop activities.

With AI-assisted workflows, this system acts like a “human-in-the-loop” assistant by:

Helping make better decisions on pricing and repairs

Reducing guesswork in diagnosing vehicle problems

Keeping all records in one place for easy access and tracking

This unlocks a smarter way of working where mechanics can focus more on fixing cars while the system helps manage information and decisions.>

Why This Matters.

Many skilled workers in developing environments lack digital tools to grow their business.

This project bridges that gap by combining real-world mechanical work with AI-powered organization, helping small business owners scale their operations and income.
